channel.title: Infrastructure-as-Code on OpenSwap Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Infrastructure-as-Code on OpenSwap Guide

item.title: OctoDNS vs DNSControl vs Lexicon: DNS-as-Code Management Guide 2026
item.description: Managing DNS records through provider web consoles is error-prone, unversioned, and impossible to audit. DNS-as-Code tools solve this by treating your DNS zones like infrastructure — defined in version-controlled configuration files, deployed through CI/CD pipelines, and rollbackable with a single commit.
